data.body: 10/20 done (added 4428). Stack head d3a3b33d8. 4532 (thin __init__.py facade) delegated to subagent — reverses a documented 'KEEP as one surface' decision in architecture.md:220, so subagent also updates that doc + removes __init__.py from module-size-allowlist. Preserving full public API incl private _json_or/_python_leaf (external test refs).
